title: Phomemo M220 Label Maker, Thermal Label Printer, Portable Label Maker Machine for Barcode, Name, Address, Labeling, Mailing, Home, Office & Small Business Compatible with Phone & Laptop
features: 20-75mm Print Width - Phomemo M220 Label Printer 20-75mm print width, supports printing wider and more types of labels; such as barcode, jars, price, clothes, QR, icon, also can print address labels, ingredient labels, shipping labels. Save you a lot of time handwriting labels and improve efficiency (label maker machine not support 4 "x 6" label)

Thermal Bluetooth Label Printer - Never need the ink, toner, and ribbon again. Phomemo M220 barcode label printer prints using thermal technology, meaning you only need to restock on labels, Phomemo M220 label maker machine come with 100pcs 40x30mm label tapes

Long Battery Life - Phomemo M220 wireless label printer upgrade 2200 mAh battery provides up to 36 rolls of continuous printing, newly added auto-sleep mode, which can reduce power consumption by 25% and extend the use time by 2-3 hours

Powerful APP - Phomemo's R&D team create the Print Master APP for you, with a variety of built-in functions. One-click use: text, pictures, barcodes, QR codes, OCR, Form, hundreds of icons, and many pre-made templates for commercial and home use. Improve your efficiency

High Compatibility - Phomemo M220 bluetooth label maker not only supports iOS, and Android mobile phone by Bluetooth connection, but also supports USB connection for Mac OS and Windows (WARNING: For your better experience, please be sure to watch the software installation tutorial on the page)

M220 Label Maker Merchant video Previous page Next page 1 "Print Master" APP 2 Easy to Install 3 Easy to Use 4 USB Connection PC 5 Fast Printing Previous page Next page Previous page Next page How to connect smartphone + PC？ 1. The smartphone needs to download the APP ""Print Master"" and connect with Bluetooth to use it. 2. download the PC software ""Labelife"" for the M220after you have downloaded the driver, you can print directly via the USB cable. Portable label maker appears to print blank? If When the app is connected correctly, there is a print blan: 1. The printing paper is reversed, Refer to the manual: Printer Paper Roll Installation 2. The print head is damaged; please replacement M220 Which App for It ? Do I Need to Log Into The App to Use it? The label maker use "Print Master" not "Phomemo", you could log into the app to use also could use it without log in Will The Label Maker Work for 4 x 6 Shipping Labels? No, The label maker only support print 20-75mm labels, couldn't work for 4 x 6 shipping labels Is this printer / software can create unit bar code? Thanks for your question,Our Barcode Printer can easily create several kinds of labels as you say, and can also create Code128, Code39, Codabar, EAN-8, EAN--13 and so on.
